project.title: Coronary Artery Disease Prediction System
project.description: Full-stack web app with Flask and ML for 10-year risk prediction.

project.title: Income Recording System
project.description: Python program for managing income data with file persistence.

project.title: Income File Import System (JavaFX)
project.description: JavaFX app to import and visualize income data from CSV files.

project.title: Personal Portfolio Website
project.description: Responsive website with custom UI to showcase projects and skills.

project.title: Database System for Hospital
project.description: MySQL database for patient records, appointments, and billing.
